moduleDescription:
This module provides an API for macros to collect compile-time information across module boundaries. It should be used instead of global {.compileTime.} variables as those break incremental compilation.

The main feature of this module is that if you create CacheTables or any other Cache types with the same name in different modules, their content will be shared, meaning that you can fill a CacheTable in one module, and iterate over its contents in another.

entries.name: CacheSeq
entries.description: Compile-time sequence of NimNodes.

entries.name: CacheTable
entries.description:
Compile-time table of key-value pairs.

Keys are strings and values are NimNodes.

entries.name: CacheCounter
entries.description: Compile-time counter, uses int for storing the count.

entries.name: value
entries.code:
proc value(c: CacheCounter): int {.magic: "NccValue", raises: [], tags: [],
                                   forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns the value of a counter c.

entries.name: inc
entries.code:
proc inc(c: CacheCounter; by = 1) {.magic: "NccInc", raises: [], tags: [],
                                    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Increments the counter c with the value by.

entries.name: add
entries.code:
proc add(s: CacheSeq; value: NimNode) {.magic: "NcsAdd", raises: [], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
entries.description: Adds value to s.

entries.name: incl
entries.code:
proc incl(s: CacheSeq; value: NimNode) {.magic: "NcsIncl", raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Adds value to s.
Hint: This doesn't do anything if value is already in s.

entries.name: len
entries.code: proc len(s: CacheSeq): int {.magic: "NcsLen", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns the length of s.

entries.code:
proc `[]`(s: CacheSeq; i: int): NimNode {.magic: "NcsAt", raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns the ith value from s.

entries.code:
proc `[]`(s: CacheSeq; i: BackwardsIndex): NimNode {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns the ith last value from s.

entries.name: items
entries.code: iterator items(s: CacheSeq): NimNode {.raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Iterates over each item in s.

entries.code:
proc `[]=`(t: CacheTable; key: string; value: NimNode) {.magic: "NctPut",
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Inserts a (key, value) pair into t.
Warning: key has to be unique! Assigning value to a key that is already in the table will result in a compiler error.

entries.name: len
entries.code:
proc len(t: CacheTable): int {.magic: "NctLen", raises: [], tags: [],
                               forbids: [].}
entries.description: Returns the number of elements in t.

entries.code:
proc `[]`(t: CacheTable; key: string): NimNode {.magic: "NctGet", raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Retrieves the NimNode value at t[key].

entries.name: hasKey
entries.code:
proc hasKey(t: CacheTable; key: string): bool {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Returns true if key is in the table t.

See also:

  • contains proc for use with the in operator

entries.name: contains
entries.code:
proc contains(t: CacheTable; key: string): bool {.inline, raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Alias of hasKey for use with the in operator.

entries.name: pairs
entries.code:
iterator pairs(t: CacheTable): (string, NimNode) {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Iterates over all (key, value) pairs in t.
